reviews.review_description: This game is really fun even though it has gtag movement, and dead if you can update and post more this can be a really popular game please don't leave this game behind, i don't want to play 1000's of the same gtag slop in the store.
Golems just keep spawning out of nowhere camping my base I just found trying to fight 8 golems with a stone sword, it’s very annoying 😢
This game is pretty good. Only thing is the bugs. Once all the bugs get fixed and maybe some better gui. Other then that the game is very good. The game has potential.

reviews.review_title: I cat play it it don't let me
Can you add animals and villagers
reviews.review_description: I love that game but I wish there was a little more to  do can you add villagers like in muck it would add alot more to do

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words! Villages are on my to do list but I have just had some problems with real life so I haven't had much time to work on the game. But I'm hoping to have an update out before the end of this year! So be on the look out for that! 

-BlackLoboGaming

reviews.review_description: Great game overall huge potential to be one of the best games but the glitches make it annoying for example when I create a completely new slot it gives me no stamina

developer_response.body:
Hey thank you so much for your honest review! Really happy to hear that you think this game has huge potential and could be amazing, that means a lot to me! I do 100% agree with you that this game has a lot of bugs and glitches and they need to be fixed before it can be great. I sadly had to take a 6 month break from working on the game but there should be a huge bug fix/polishing update out this month! Hope to see you in game in the future!
-BlackLoboGaming

reviews.review_description: i did everything but i still cant get in multiplayer.
Best survival game on quest yet

developer_response.body:
Really glad you enjoyed the game!
-BlackLoboGaming

Hey if you message me on Discord (@the.oncoming.storm) I can help you with that!
-BlackLoboGaming

reviews.review_description: Although multi player don't work it is still fun me and my friends play all the time thank you for making a great game

developer_response.body:
Really glad you enjoyed the game! I know I haven't updated the game for a hot minute but the next update should fix a bunch of bugs and make the game way better! Thanks for the review!
-BlackLoboGaming

reviews.review_description: I played it and I love it so much you must install it or I’ll tickle your toes at 3am
this game made a MASSIVE impact in my daily life, i now run breathe and feel wild!!🔥🔥

developer_response.body:
